name: Dark Wyrm
tips: The discard-3 mode turns a dead hand into a free 33🗡️/33🤍 — and the Summon draw immediately starts refilling.
Paying the 5 mana keeps your hand intact; discard mode keeps your mana for magic (which no longer costs your action). Pick whichever resource you can spare.
Tree Wyrm's tutor fetches Dark Wyrms — 'Tutor 2 Wyrms' can chain into a free summon if your hand is stocked.
It is a Wyrm, not a Mage: despite the Dark element it does NOT count as a Dark Mage and grants no Dark Matter.
rulings: Dark Wyrm may be played EITHER for its printed 5 mana (no discards) OR for 0 mana by discarding 3 other cards from your hand — your choice when both are affordable.
The alternate cost needs 3 OTHER cards: Dark Wyrm itself never counts toward its own discard cost.
Alternate-cost discards go to the Exhaust Pile (revealed), exactly like paid discard costs — they are discards, and ON_DISCARD effects on the discarded cards fire.
A [[Negate]] on the summon declaration forfeits the cost either way — the mana or the 3 discarded cards are NOT refunded (harsh by design, same as every summon).
Summon: Draw 1 fires after the summon resolves (Window B); a full hand overdraw-burns the drawn card.
